TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 611

JUDGE DIANE WICK: CLERK-BETH WILBER; REPORTER-BRENDA FIELDS: 10:00AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL, ROBERT H. PETERSON APPEARING FOR PLTF; MARCUS MERCHASIN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT; PARTIES ARE ALSO PRESENT. MR. PETESON INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE CASE HAS SETTLED AND TERMS ARE READ INTO THE RECORD: MR. JALES M. VALADA WILL GIVE ELISA BIANCHI $1800.00 BY 12/13/01. WHEN PLAINTIFF HAS RECEIVED THE MONEY THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BY THE PLAINTIFF. EACH SIDE WILL PAY THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS. 10:09AM THERE BEING NO FURTHER MATTERS FOR THE RECORD COURT IS ADJOURNED.
